headline: Cognizant (CTSH) Expands Frontier AI Workforce To Tackle Enterprise Readiness
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions (NasdaqGS:CTSH) is launching a major workforce expansion to scale its Frontier certified AI talent pipeline and operational infrastructure. The program focuses on certifying engineers and business operators to deploy, govern, and optimize enterprise AI across global client environments. This initiative is model agnostic and cross cloud, targeting production grade AI, governance, and domain specific business outcomes. Cognizant Technology Solutions is pushing...
